basics.name: Ananya Sutradhar
basics.summary: Pre-doctoral Research Fellow at Microsoft Research India (Team DiskANN), focused on making retrieval better and evaluating Deep Research systems. SPAR Fellow at Cornell with Prof. Lionel Levine.

work.name: Microsoft Research India
work.summary: Working on making retrieval better and evaluating Deep Research systems.

work.name: Amazon
work.summary: Implemented domain-driven design principles to optimize the notification triggering process.

education.institution: Indian Institute of Engineering Science and Technology (IIEST) Shibpur

publications.name: Systematic Biomarker Discovery for Glioblastoma Subtyping Using Machine Learning
publications.summary: A systematic pipeline for biomarker discovery in glioblastoma subtyping using transcriptomics data and machine learning, incorporating feature selection and gene co-expression network analysis.

publications.name: Learning Filter-Aware Distance Metrics for Nearest Neighbor Search with Multiple Filters
publications.summary: We study the problem of nearest neighbor search under multiple conjunctive filters and propose a method to learn filter-aware distance metrics that improve retrieval efficiency and accuracy.
